description: User clicked subscribe / initiated Stripe checkout session from subscriptions page
Stripe webhook confirmed a successful subscription checkout (server-side, canonical conversion event)
Stripe webhook fired customer.subscription.updated — tracks plan changes / churn signals
User opened the Stripe billing portal (churn risk signal)
Caregiver uploaded a document (medical record, insurance card, etc.)
OCR processing job kicked off after document upload
User confirmed OCR-extracted fields — completes doc ingest funnel
User registered a push notification token — engagement / retention signal
A member was added to a care team via the members API
Visitor submitted the contact form (marketing funnel)
Top-of-funnel view event for the AI daily brief (justified pageview — retention metric)
Top-of-funnel view event for the authenticated dashboard landing
